executionHistory.summary: Initial business analysis and spec.md creation for government alerts connector
Chaos-hardening: found and fixed 8 issues (3 race conditions, 1 memory leak, 2 input validation gaps, 1 error handling gap, 1 context handling gap). Added 8 chaos tests.

Chaos-hardening R26: found and fixed 3 issues (TravelProvider location validation bypass C-017-001, notifier panic crash C-017-002, Close-during-Sync health corruption C-017-003). Added 9 adversarial tests.
Stabilize R56: found and fixed 1 issue (STAB-017-001 missing maxSyncDuration bound for aggregate sync timeout). Added 2 adversarial tests. 168 total test functions.

Reconcile R72: full claimed-vs-implemented reconciliation. All functional claims substantiated. 168 tests pass. No code drift, no config wiring gaps. 2 info-level documentation observations (design single-file drift accepted, report test count snapshot staleness noted). No changes needed.

Spec-review pass for legacy reconcile-to-doc completion. Verified spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, and report.md remain mutually consistent after Apr 22 harden sweep (175 test functions, 7 sources wired end-to-end with proximity_verified flag). No active superseded specs. No redundancy with adjacent connector specs (016-weather, 019-connector-wiring). Spec content remains authoritative for the implemented government-alerts surface.

Chaos re-validation: ran -race over TestConcurrentSyncHealth, TestConcurrentCloseHealth, TestSyncContextCancellation, TestSync_MaxSyncDurationBoundsTimeout, TestSync_ParentContextCancellation_StopsSyncEarly, TestKnownMapEviction. All clean (1.677s). C-017-001/002/003 and STAB-017-001 fixes still hold under race detector.

Trace-guard cleanup batch (post MIT-FRAMEWORK-001 patch): closed 18 trace failures (18->0). Added Test Plan tables to Scopes 01-06 referencing internal/connector/alerts/alerts_test.go (already mentioned in report.md). Added 'Scenario "<scenario name>": ' DoD-trace prefixes to existing DoD bullets covering SCN-GA-PROX-001, SCN-GA-LIFE-001, SCN-GA-USGS-001/002, SCN-GA-NWS-001, SCN-GA-CONN-001, SCN-GA-TSUN-001, SCN-GA-AQI-001, SCN-GA-GDACS-001, SCN-GA-NOTIF-001/002. No DoD content rewriting; no source/test/config/framework changes. artifact-lint clean; traceability-guard PASSED 0 failures.

Simplify-to-doc (stochastic sweep-2026-05-23-r30 Round 2, parent-expanded child workflow): SIMP-017-001 fixed. Extracted claimAlert(id, now) bool helper to consolidate 7 inline dedup-acquire patterns (Lock/check known[id]/record/Unlock) in Sync() across all 7 source loops (USGS earthquake/volcano, NWS, NOAA tsunami, InciWeb wildfire, AirNow AQI, GDACS). Behavior-preserving (defer Unlock matches original critical-section boundary). LOC 1815->1788. Race detector clean: TestSync_Deduplication, TestSync_ConcurrentWithLiveKnownMapWrites, TestKnownMapEviction, TestConcurrentSyncHealth, TestConcurrentCloseHealth all pass. Full alerts suite green under -race (4.953s). go build ./... clean. No spec content changed; certification preserved.

Regression-to-doc (stochastic sweep-2026-05-23-r30 Round 12, parent-expanded child workflow): REG-017-001 found and fixed via BUG-017-002. Framework upgrade on 2026-05-12 (commit 3037eb8c) tightened traceability-guard.sh G068 matcher (word-length floor 4->3, trimmed stop list). Under v3.8.0, Scope 03 SCN-GA-NWS-002 lost faithful DoD mapping (existing bullets scored 2/3 required overlap and lacked trace ID). Artifact-only fix: inserted 1 scenario-prefix DoD bullet for SCN-GA-NWS-002 into scopes.md Scope 03 between existing 'Event types classified' and '17 unit tests pass' bullets. All other bullets byte-identical. Underlying behavior (mapNWSSeverity + classifyNWSEventType) was already delivered since 2026-04-11 and continuously tested. Post-fix: traceability-guard PASS (13/13 mapped, 0 unmapped), artifact-lint PASS (parent + bug), go test PASS (175 tests, 7.358s), race subset clean (1.334s). Spec status preserved (done); certification preserved.

OPS-002 G088 recert (no-source reconstruction). Reconstructed original certification moment from git: after a 2026-04-10 done->validated->done cycle and a 2026-04-11 reopen to in-progress (fe31f4ba), the final certification is commit 0d1a7b1d (2026-04-12T12:20:16Z) in_progress->done ('feat(017): implement proactive delivery + travel alerts - all 6 scopes done'); verified no later state.json status reset. Reviewed 6 post-cert planning edits to THIS spec, all category (b) incidental reconciliation: ee6b7ca0 (2026-04-14 scopes.md scope-summary table Not Started/In Progress->Done for scopes 3/4/5, catch-up to certified state); e5bfde97 (2026-04-22 scopes.md added Gherkin SCN-GA-NWS/TSUN scenario docs with CHECKED [x] DoD + evidence for already-shipped behavior); c363141c (2026-04-24 scopes.md evidence reconcile, balanced, no reset); 2fe092b5 (2026-05-09 DoD-trace-prefix + Test Plan path wiring, 46/53 trace failures); e2b69220 (2026-05-24 +2-line SCN-GA-NWS-002 DoD-trace bullet, G068 regression); 19b31c0a (2026-05-28 spec.md Status banner->Done). No post-promotion requirement/scenario/DoD semantic change; current scopes.md all-Done with 0 unchecked DoD; implementation unchanged. certifiedAt advanced to 2026-06-06T17:00:00Z for Gate G088.

Reconcile-to-doc (stochastic sweep round 4 of 20, trigger validate, parent-expanded-child-mode). Full claimed-vs-implemented reconciliation: all functional claims substantiated — connector interface, 7 source parsers (USGS/NWS/NOAA/volcano/InciWeb/AirNow/GDACS), haversineKm proximity (L543), claimAlert dedup helper (L436), CAP severity classifiers (classifyEarthquakeSeverity L693/mapNWSSeverity L913/classifyNWSEventType L929), mergedLocations 2x travel radius (L1690), maybeNotify NATS routing (L1735), alerts.notify+ALERTS contract (nats_contract.json L136/L373), connectors.go wiring (L50/L56/L355/L378), zero os.Getenv, gov-alerts config L458. go test ./internal/connector/alerts/ green (176 tests pass, 2.624s). Both child bugs BUG-017-001/002 remain done. One info-level finding RECON-017-R4-001: report.md 2026-04-23 evidence snapshots (alerts.go 1815->1800, alerts_test.go 5256->5264, +retry_test.go 116) drifted due to cross-spec edits (7e4353a3 BUG-022-003 429/Retry-After spec-022-owned; e69f0476 digest fix). Reconciled by appending dated 2026-06-06 reconciliation report; historical evidence blocks preserved (no fabrication). No code/test/config changes.

Post-reconcile spec-review for the R4 reconcile-to-doc touch. spec.md/design.md/scopes.md planning truth unchanged this round; only report.md gained a dated reconciliation report and state.json was recertified. Verified scopes.md remains all-Done with 0 unchecked DoD, all 6 scopes + 7 phases intact, implementation matches claims (176 tests green). No superseded/redundant content vs adjacent connector specs (016-weather, 019-connector-wiring, 022). certifiedAt advanced to 2026-06-06T18:00:00Z for Gate G088; requiresRevalidation NOT set (spec remains done).

Chaos-hardening (stochastic sweep Round 12, trigger chaos, parent-expanded-child-mode). Probed unvalidated external-feed inputs flowing into arithmetic. Found and fixed 1 issue C-017-004: fetchAirNowAQI used the untrusted AirNow HourObserved integer directly in t.Add(time.Duration(e.HourObserved)*time.Hour) with no range check. A malformed/adversarial feed sending a large HourObserved yields a far-future ObservationTime (1,000,000 -> year 2138) or overflows the int64 time.Duration and wraps (9,000,000,000 -> year 2262); ObservationTime becomes CapturedAt which drives digest most-recent windowing and alert lifecycle ordering, so one garbage record could pin/hide an air-quality alert indefinitely. Every other external coord/radius/magnitude/ID/URL in the connector is already bounds-checked; this integer was the lone gap. Fix: reject HourObserved outside [0,24), fall back to observed date (midnight) with WARN log; documented hours 0-23 unchanged. Scenario-first TDD: added TestFetchAirNowAQI_OutOfRangeHourObserved_BoundedTime (7 sub-cases: 3 valid-hour positive controls + 4 adversarial). RED captured before fix (year 2138/2262 timestamps); GREEN after. Full alerts suite green (177 test functions, 374 pass lines incl subtests, 2.525s); race subset clean (1.296s); go build ./... clean. Change boundary: only internal/connector/alerts/alerts.go + alerts_test.go + report.md + state.json. Spec status preserved (done); certification preserved.
